creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251921
Patch for atkmm

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers on 14.0-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere (with PR 280173 and 280175 applied):
